summary: SQLite migration verified as drop-in replacement for MongoDB. All backend endpoints return identical shapes; auto-seed populated DB correctly; $or query and nested enrichment both work; frontend Dashboard/Systemer/Systemdetalje render correctly against SQLite backend.
passed: GET /api/dashboard returns correct KPIs (aabne=4, afventer=1, forsinkede=1, systemer=3, plus lists)
Auto-seed populated: 3 systems, 4 orgs, 4 contacts, 5 tasks, 3 log entries, 3 kanban columns (Todo/Doing/Done)
GET /api/organizations/{Statens IT}/systems returns 2 systems via $or (leverandor_id OR driftsleverandor_id) - Ydelsessystem + Sagsbehandlingssystem
GET /api/systems/{id}/contacts returns enriched objects with both contact and organization nested data
CRUD verified on tasks (create/update/delete) and log_entries (create draft, update draft=false, delete)
Frontend Dashboard renders with 4 KPI cards and lists (Kommende opfølgninger, Seneste log visible)
Systemer page: row click navigates to /systemer/{id}
Systemdetalje page: all 4 accordion sections render (Systemoverblik, Kontakter på systemet, Opgaver, Logbog)
Enriched contact rows display with organization name (KMD A/S, Statens IT, Fagkontor Ydelser)
No error elements or console errors detected on frontend
notes: Did not exhaustively test Logbog Sheet autosave flow, Kontakter/Organisationer dialog CRUD, or Opgaver kanban drag-and-drop from the UI (deferred to full testing agent). Backend endpoints these depend on are all verified working.
